run.descriptionTextChat: Review the conversation history, metrics, and context captured for this text session.
run.descriptionVoice: Your voice agent run has been completed successfully. You can preview or download the transcript and recording.
run.unavailableDescription: This run does not have a details view yet. Go back to the workflow to continue testing or make changes.
run.onboardingMessage: Edit your workflow to adjust the voice agent's behavior, add new steps, or modify the conversation flow.

editor.testerDisabledHistorical: Return to the draft before starting a new test session.
editor.testerDisabledDirty: Save the latest draft before testing so the session uses the workflow you are looking at.
editor.testerDisabledValidation: Resolve the current validation errors before starting another test.

modelConfig.title: Model Configuration
modelConfig.description: Override global model settings for this workflow. Toggle individual services to customize.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.description:
Add any specific words that you would want the bot to actively listen for. The Voice Agent learns your unique words and names. Add expected words and phrases, company jargon, named entities, or industry-specific lingo.

Example: billing department, tretinoin etc.

(May incur extra cost depending on provider)

embed.title: Configure Widget
embed.description: Add "{workflowName}" to any website with a simple script tag.
embed.enableDescription: Allow this workflow to be embedded on external websites

modeFloating.title: Floating Widget
modeFloating.description: Shows as a button in corner of the page

modeInline.title: Inline Component
modeInline.description: Embeds directly in your page content

modeHeadless.title: Headless (Bring Your Own UI)
modeHeadless.description: No UI — drive calls from your own buttons via the JS API

headlessInstructions.addScript: Add the embed script tag to your page (see below).
headlessInstructions.noUi: The widget renders no UI — render your own buttons.
headlessInstructions.subscribe: Subscribe to onCallStart, onCallEnd, onStatusChange, onError to drive your UI.
headlessInstructions.userGesture: start() must run inside a user-gesture handler (click) so the browser grants microphone access.

embed.headlessExampleTitle: Example — track status in your own state
embed.headlessExampleDescription: Mirror the call status into a variable you control, then render whatever UI you like from it. The status values are idle, connecting, connected, failed.

inlineInstructions.addDiv: Add a div with id="dograh-inline-container" where you want the widget
inlineInstructions.renderInside: The widget will render inside this container
inlineInstructions.fullControl: You have full control over the container's styling

embed.embedCodeHelp: Add this script to your website's HTML to enable the voice widget. Configuration changes will apply automatically without re-embedding.
embed.embedCodePlaceholder: Click Save Configurations to generate your embed script.

recordings.title: Workflow Recordings
recordings.description: Upload or record audio for hybrid prompts. Recordings are scoped to your current TTS configuration. Use @ in prompt fields to insert them.
recordings.noTtsConfig: No TTS configuration found. Set it in Model Configurations.
recordings.empty: No recordings yet for this TTS configuration.

errors.recordingTooLarge: Recording ({size}MB) exceeds the maximum allowed size of 5MB.
errors.microphoneDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone permissions.
errors.ttsRequired: TTS configuration (provider, model, voice) must be set in your user configuration before uploading.

configureTelephony.title: Configure Telephony
configureTelephony.description: You need to configure your telephony settings before making phone calls. You will be redirected to the telephony configuration page.

form.description: Enter the phone number or SIP endpoint to call. The number will be saved automatically.
form.noPhoneNumbers: No phone numbers in this configuration. The provider will pick one automatically.

voicemail.title: Voicemail Detection
voicemail.description: Configure voicemail detection to automatically detect and end calls when a voicemail system is reached.
voicemail.useWorkflowLlmHelper: Use the LLM configured in your account settings.
voicemail.systemPromptHelper: Prompt for voicemail classification. The LLM must respond with either "{conversation}" or "{voicemail}".
voicemail.speechCutoffHelper: Trigger classification early if first turn speech exceeds this duration.

ambientNoise.title: Ambient Noise
ambientNoise.description: Add background office ambient noise to make the conversation sound more natural.

turnDetection.title: Turn Detection
turnDetection.description: Configure how the agent detects when the user has finished speaking.
turnDetection.transcriptionHelp: Best for short responses (1-2 word statements). Ends turn when transcription indicates completion.
turnDetection.turnAnalyzerHelp: Best for longer responses with natural pauses. Uses ML model to detect end of turn.
turnDetection.incompleteTimeoutHelp: Max silence duration before ending an incomplete turn. Default: 2 seconds

contextCompaction.title: Context Compaction
contextCompaction.description: Automatically summarize conversation context when transitioning between nodes. Removes stale tool calls and keeps the context clean for the new node.

callManagement.title: Call Management
callManagement.description: Configure call duration limits and idle timeout settings.

templateVars.title: Template Context Variables
templateVars.description: Add or remove template context variables that will be available to your workflow. You can use these variables within your workflow nodes within double curly braces. Example: {example}.

tester.authRequired: Authentication is required before testing can start.

onboarding.title: Try Your First Web Call
onboarding.message: Start a browser call here to hear the agent, inspect the transcript, and validate the workflow before you customize it further.

voice.emptyTitle: Call this agent in the browser
voice.emptyDescription: Test the agent over a voice call. Some telephony-only tools, like call transfer, are not yet supported here.
voice.authRequired: Authentication is required before browser tests can start.
voice.createRunError: Failed to create browser test run

chat.emptyDescription: Test the agent over a text conversation. Send messages and see how it responds, with tool calls, transitions, and rewind support.
chat.sendToStart: Send a message to start the conversation.
chat.editHint: Edit the selected user message, then press Enter to rerun from that point.

simulator.defaultPrompt: Act like a skeptical prospect. Push on pricing, ask about integrations, and end the chat if the assistant becomes repetitive.
simulator.description: Drive multi-turn, agent-vs-agent tests with a persona prompt.

emptyHistorical.title: No conversation recorded
emptyHistorical.subtitle: Real-time feedback events were not captured for this call

emptyLive.title: No messages yet
emptyLive.subtitleActive: Start speaking to see the transcript
emptyLive.subtitleInactive: Start the call to begin the conversation

list.agentBuilderDescription: AI generates a workflow from your description
list.blankCanvasDescription: Start from scratch with an empty workflow
list.dragAndDropJson: Drag and drop your Workflow JSON File here, or Click to Select
list.uploadFailed: Failed to upload workflow. Please check if the file is valid.
list.invalidJsonFile: Please upload a valid JSON file

folders.emptyFolder: This folder is empty. Use “Move to folder” on an agent to add it here.
folders.deleteConfirmDescription: The {count} {count, plural, one {agent} other {agents}} in this folder won’t be deleted — they’ll move to Uncategorized.

report.title: Report
report.description: Download a CSV report of completed runs for this agent, optionally filtered by date range.

general.title: General
general.description: Agent name, call behavior, and turn detection.
general.ambientNoiseDescription: Add background ambient noise to make the conversation sound more natural.
general.customAudioFileDescription: Upload your own audio file or use the default office ambience.
general.turnDetectionDescription: Configure how the agent detects when the user has finished speaking.
general.transcriptionHelp: Best for short responses (1-2 word statements). Ends turn when transcription indicates completion.
general.turnAnalyzerHelp: Best for longer responses with natural pauses. Uses ML model to detect end of turn.
general.incompleteTurnTimeoutHelp: Max silence duration before ending an incomplete turn. Default: 2 seconds
general.contextCompactionDescription: Automatically summarize conversation context when transitioning between nodes. Not applicable in Realtime mode — the speech-to-speech service manages its own conversation state and this setting is ignored.
general.webSearchDescription: Let the agent ground answers with live Google Search results (Gemini agents only). Useful for general questions beyond the knowledge base.
general.callManagementDescription: Configure call duration limits and idle timeout settings.

variables.title: Template Variables
variables.description: Variables available in workflow prompts via {syntax} syntax for testing the workflow.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.description: Add words the agent should actively listen for — company jargon, names, industry terms. May incur extra cost depending on provider.
dictionary.placeholder: Enter words separated by comma (e.g. billing department, tretinoin)

voicemail.title: Voicemail Detection
voicemail.description: Automatically detect and end calls when a voicemail system is reached.
voicemail.useWorkflowLlmHelp: Use the LLM configured in your account settings.
voicemail.systemPromptHelp: The LLM must respond with either "CONVERSATION" or "VOICEMAIL".
voicemail.speechCutoffHelp: Trigger classification early if first turn speech exceeds this duration.

identity.title: Agent UUID
identity.description: Stable identifier for this agent. Used in agent-stream URLs and other integrations where a numeric workflow ID isn't portable.

models.title: Model Overrides
models.descriptionV2: Override the full organization model configuration for this workflow.
models.descriptionLegacy: Override global model settings for this workflow. Toggle individual services to customize.
models.loadDefaultsFailed: Failed to load model configuration defaults
models.legacyNotice: This workflow is using legacy model overrides. Migrate organization model configuration to use v2 overrides.
models.overrideEnabledHelp: This workflow uses its own complete model configuration.
models.overrideDisabledHelp: This workflow uses the organization model configuration.

recordings.title: Recordings
recordings.descriptionBefore: Recordings are now managed at the organization level and shared across all agents. Use
recordings.descriptionAfter: in prompt fields to insert them.

deployment.title: Add to Website
deployment.description: Configure a widget to add this voice agent to your website.

create.title: Create Voice Agent
create.subtitle: Tell us about your use case and we'll create a customized voice agent for you
create.callTypeHelp: Choose whether users will call your AI or your AI will call users
create.useCasePlaceholder: e.g., Lead Qualification, HR Screening, Customer Support
create.useCaseHelp: Describe the primary purpose of your voice agent
create.activityDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe briefly what your voice agent will do (e.g., Qualify leads for real estate, Screen candidates for roles, Handle customer support). This will be a prompt to an LLM.
create.activityDescriptionHelp: This description will be used to generate the AI prompt for your voice agent
create.loadingMessage: We're setting up your voice agent with your specifications. This will just take a moment...
create.successBody1: A voice agent workflow has been generated for your use case, with some artificial data and sample actions.
create.successBody2: The voice bot is pre-set to communicate in English with an American accent.
create.successBody3: Next steps would be to test the voice bot in the editor, and then modify it to suit your use case.

errors.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to create a workflow
errors.createFailed: Failed to create workflow. Please try again.

context.title: Template Context Variables
context.keyExists: Variable with this key already exists

audio.permissionDeniedHelp: To use the voice agent, you need to allow microphone access. Please enable it in your browser settings and try again.
audio.allowInDialog: Please allow microphone access in the browser dialog
audio.clickToGrant: Click below to grant microphone access
